an1.188:1.1: "Foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my *bhikkhu* disciples who are elders is Aññāsikoṇḍañña.
an1.189:1.1: … Among those of great *paññā* is Sāriputta.
an1.190:1.1: … Among those with spiritual power is Mahāmoggallāna.
an1.191:1.1: … Among those who speak of ascetic practices is Mahākassapa.
an1.192:1.1: … Among those with the divine eye is Anuruddha.
an1.193:1.1: … Among those of high birth is Bhaddiyo, the son of Kāḷigodhā.
an1.194:1.1: … Among those with a melodious voice is Lakunḍaka Bhaddiyo.
an1.195:1.1: … Among those who roar the lion's roar is Piṇḍolabhāradvāja.
an1.197:1.1: … Among those who expound in full the meaning of what was spoken in brief is Mahākaccāna."
